name: trickle-vscode
description: Hover over any variable to see its runtime type, tensor shape, and sample value captured by trickle

commands.title: Trickle: Cycle Inline Hint Mode (auto → sample → type)

trickle.showSampleValues.description: Show sample values in hover (not just types)

trickle.inlineHints.description: Show inline type hints after variable declarations

enumDescriptions: Show sample values for primitives, types for complex structures (default)
Always show sample/value data inline when available
Always show the runtime type inline
Show variable values captured at the last error (post-mortem debug view)
trickle.inlineHintMode.description: What to display in inline hints: auto (smart), sample (prefer values), type (prefer types), or error (post-mortem)

trickle.sampleLength.description: Maximum character length for sample values in hover tooltips and inline hints
